offer: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inefficient manual inspections cause delayed reporting. We provide automated inspection and reporting instead of manual inspection and reporting methods.
problem: Inefficient manual inspection processes lead to delayed reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows

Participate in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try simple inspection checklist and invoice entry form
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing property data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
